name: Pineapple Delight (Ma Haw)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a wok or large skillet. Add minced garlic, cilantro, and onion. Stir-fry until fragrant.
2. Add the pineapple wedges to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, or until the pineapple is lightly caramelized.
3. Stir in the fish sauce, tamarind juice, lime juice, and palm sugar. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens slightly.
4. Add the crushed peanuts, red chili pepper shreds, and cilantro shreds to the mixture. Toss everything together to combine.
5. Spoon small portions of the pineapple and peanut mixture onto each pineapple wedge.
6. Allow the dish to cool for a few minutes before serving as an appetizer.
One can of pre-cut pineapple pieces can be used instead of fresh fruit.
Recipe By: Joe Sweeney (sweeney@asiaonline.net)
